case_title: ROBERT A IMHOFF VS. ABEL MOISES GARCIA et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, ABEL MOISES DBA LA IGLESIA DE DIOS DE LA PROFECIA
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, ABEL MOISES DBA LA IGLESIA DE DIOS DE LA PROFECIA

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ABEL GARCIA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. ABEL GARCIA HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-30-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF JURY FEE AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62) AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ABEL MOISES DBA LA IGLESIA DE DIOS DE LA PROFECIA
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ABEL MOISES DBA LA IGLESIA DE DIOS DE LA PROFECIA

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ABEL GARCIA'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER AS TO JURY FEES AND COSTS AND REPORTER'S FEES DENIED. ABEL GARCIA HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF ABEL MOISES GARCIA ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
